ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Standardized name of the metric (e.g., air_temperature) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Measurement units (e.g., K for Kelvin) */,
  "bety_reference" INTEGER /* Reference used in the BETY database */,
  "isimip_reference" INTEGER /* Reference used in the ISIMIP database */,
  "cruncep_reference" INTEGER /* Reference used in the CRUNCEP database */,
  "narr_reference" INTEGER /* Reference used in the NARR database */,
  "ameriflux_reference" INTEGER /* Reference used in the AmeriFlux database */,
  "metric_version" TEXT /* Version of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of measurement (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Primary source of the metric data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date of creation */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_cruncep_reference FOREIGN KEY ("cruncep_reference") REFERENCES cruncep_references ("cruncep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_ameriflux_reference FOREIGN KEY ("ameriflux_reference") REFERENCES ameriflux_references ("ameriflux_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_narr_reference FOREIGN KEY ("narr_reference") REFERENCES narr_references ("narr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_isimip_reference FOREIGN KEY ("isimip_reference") REFERENCES isimip_references ("isimip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_bety_reference FOREIGN KEY ("bety_reference") REFERENCES bety_references ("bety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., K for Kelvin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit's use or context */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a base unit */,
  "base_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the base unit if this is a derived unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bety_references" (
  "bety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BETY reference */,
  "reference_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference (e.g., airT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the reference */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original source document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date of creation */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isimip_references" (
  "isimip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ISIMIP reference */,
  "reference_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference (e.g., tasAdjust) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the reference */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original source document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date of creation */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isimip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cruncep_references" (
  "cruncep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CRUNCEP reference */,
  "reference_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference (e.g., tair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the reference */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original source document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date of creation */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cruncep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "narr_references" (
  "narr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NARR reference */,
  "reference_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference (e.g., air) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the reference */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original source document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date of creation */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("narr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ameriflux_references" (
  "ameriflux_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AmeriFlux reference */,
  "reference_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference (e.g., TA (C)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the reference */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original source document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date of creation */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ameriflux_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date of user account creation */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Affiliated organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and operating system) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
